changelog: This release fixes duplicate devices appearing in the Droid tab, adds a Pi model column, and improves feature badge accuracy.
Duplicate device fix - Devices that appeared multiple times due to mDNS hostname conflicts (e.g., device-2 ghosts) are now automatically deduplicated and cleaned up
Pi model column - The Droid tab now shows each device's Raspberry Pi model (Zero W, Zero 2, Pi 3, Pi 4) between the Device and Version columns
Accurate feature badges - Comlink, WCB, and Maestro badges now reflect the configured enabled state rather than just checking if a process is running
Maestro badge shows when the feature is enabled and hardware is detected; WCB badge shows when enabled and listeners are active
Improved mDNS discovery - Fixed hostname parsing and eliminated spurious IPv6 errors in device scanning
Cross-major-version updates - Update checker now supports upgrading across major versions
Maestro info icons - Channel configuration labels now include clickable hint icons for quick reference

1.note: Debug images available - contact for download links
